allocation_strategy: Clinical judgment prioritizing common medical renal diseases with high diagnostic yield

questions.topic: Diabetic nephropathy vs. other proteinuric diseases
questions.education_objective: Recognize diabetic nephropathy features and distinguish from other causes of proteinuria/nephrotic syndrome

questions.topic: Acute tubular necrosis: patterns & differential diagnosis
questions.education_objective: Identify ATN morphologic patterns and distinguish from other causes of acute kidney injury
Recognize IgA nephropathy and differentiate from other causes of isolated hematuria
Classify lupus nephritis patterns and understand prognostic implications
Distinguish MPGN patterns from crescentic GN and understand underlying etiologies
